positive: A stylized, abstract representation of a glowing forest at dusk, viewed through a cinematic lens. The main subject is a central cluster of stylized bioluminescent fungi and exotic flora, emitting soft, vibrant cyan and deep magenta light. The composition must be symmetrical and highly detailed, featuring thick, clean silhouettes of oversized, fantastical leaves and stylized mushrooms against a deep indigo or midnight blue background. Use a strong graphic novel aesthetic mixed with Art Nouveau fluidity. Ideal for apparel: clean lines, limited color palette, high contrast, and perfect central focus. Volumetric lighting, octane render, perfect composition, vector art quality.
